name: Crab on Crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the liquid from the crabmeat into a small microwave bowl or measuring cup.
2. Stir in the cornstarch until dissolved.
3. Stir in the marjoram and garlic salt.
4. Cook on HIGH for 30 seconds, then stir and return to the microwave for an additional 30 seconds if the mixture is not clear and thickened.
5. Allow to cool.
6. Flake the crabmeat.
7. Combine the flaked crabmeat, celery, onion, and mayonnaise in a bowl. Stir in the crab liquid.
8. Divide the crabmeat mixture evenly between the 36 crackers.
9. Place 12 crackers in a circle around the edge of a paper plate (repeat for two more plates).
10. Cook on HIGH for 30 seconds, then rotate the plate one-half turn and continue cooking for an additional 15 seconds.
Note:
One Serving: Calories: 59; Carbohydrates: 6; Exchange: 1/2 bread; 1/4 medium-fat meat
Source: Diabetic Microwave Cookbook, by Mary Jane Finsand (1989), ISBN 0-8069-6957-1, ISBN 0-8069-6960-1 (pbk.)
